name: Meow Time Machine: Munch
short_description: This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time and space to explore the tumultuous inner world of expressionist master Edvard Munch. From the shadows of childhood to the birth of "The Scream," from European travels to the tranquility of his later years.
detailed_description:
Breaking the Shackles of the Soul: Munch's Spiritual World

This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time and space to explore the tumultuous inner world of expressionist master Edvard Munch. From the shadows of childhood to the birth of "The Scream," from European travels to the tranquility of his later years, each step is an exploration into the depths of the soul.

Journey of the Soul

Embark on a five-chapter spiritual journey, from Munch's painful childhood to his artistic awakening, from artistic exploration in Paris and Berlin to the shocking birth of "The Scream," and finally to the peaceful contemplation of his later years. In each carefully designed scene, you will collect items intimately connected to Munch's life, piecing together the spiritual puzzle of an artistic giant.

Unique Gaming Experience

  • Beautifully Painted Scenes: Reinterprets the life stages of the expressionist master in an adorable style

  • Delicate Emotional Exploration: Experience the artist's inner turbulence at a cold Nordic window, Parisian art salons, and Oslo fjord boardwalks

  • Fun Tasks: Join Munch's feline companions to collect scattered special items and uncover hidden stories

  • Art History Exploration: Learn about the origins and development of expressionist art in the game, and feel Munch's profound influence on modern art

Game Features

  • Five carefully designed chapters, each telling a key stage in Munch's life

  • Over 30 unique scenes, from 19th century Norway to European art centers

  • Dozens of key collectible items

  • Side quests brought by cat companions

  • Immersive puzzles that blend art history knowledge with emotional experiences

Game Instructions

  • This is a small hidden object puzzle game with five chapters, with a total gameplay time of approximately 1-2 hours.

  • Click on the left and right sides of the book to turn pages

  • Press esc to exit the game

  • The overall difficulty of the game is not high

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Russian, Turkish, Polish, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean, Japanese
